Hebrew: וָאֵרָ֗א אֶל־אַבְרָהָ֛ם אֶל־יִצְחָ֥ק וְאֶֽל־יַעֲקֹ֖ב בְּאֵ֣ל שַׁדָּ֑י וּשְׁמִ֣י יְהוָ֔ה לֹ֥א נוֹדַ֖עְתִּי לָהֶֽם׃
Translit: vāʾērāʾ ʾel-ʾavrāhām ʾel-yitṣḥāq vəʾel-yaʿaqōv bəʾēl shaddāi ūshəmî ʾadhōnāi lōʾ nōdhaʿtî lāhem
English: I appeared to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, as God Almighty, but by my name YHVH I did not make myself known to them.

Hebrew: אַתָּ֞ה תִּשְׁמַ֤ע הַשָּׁמַ֨יִם֙ מְכ֣וֹן שִׁבְתֶּ֔ךָ וְעָשִׂ֕יתָ כְּכֹ֛ל אֲשֶׁר־יִקְרָ֥א אֵלֶ֖יךָ הַנׇּכְרִ֑י לְמַ֣עַן יֵדְעוּן֩ כׇל־עַמֵּ֨י הָאָ֜רֶץ אֶת־שְׁמֶ֗ךָ לְיִרְאָ֤ה אֹֽתְךָ֙ כְּעַמְּךָ֣ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְלָדַ֕עַת כִּי־שִׁמְךָ֣ נִקְרָ֔א עַל־הַבַּ֥יִת הַזֶּ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר בָּנִֽיתִי׃
Translit: ʾattāh tishmaʿ hasshāmayim məkhōn shivtekhā vəʿāsîthā kəkhōl ʾasher-yiqrāʾ ʾēlekhā hannokhrî ləmaʿan yēdhəʿūn kol-ʿammē hāʾāretṣ ʾeth-shəmekhā ləyirʾāh ʾōthəkhā kəʿamməkhā yisrāʾēl vəlādhaʿath kî-shimkhā niqrāʾ ʿal-habbayith hazzeh ʾasher bānîthî
English: Hear thou in heaven thy dwelling place, and do according to all for which the foreigner calls to thee; in order that all the peoples of the earth may know thy name and fear thee, as do thy people Israel, and that they may know that this house which I have built is called by thy name.

Hebrew: וְאַתָּ֞ה תִּשְׁמַ֤ע מִן־הַשָּׁמַ֨יִם֙ מִמְּכ֣וֹן שִׁבְתֶּ֔ךָ וְעָשִׂ֕יתָ כְּכֹ֛ל אֲשֶׁר־יִקְרָ֥א אֵלֶ֖יךָ הַנׇּכְרִ֑י לְמַ֣עַן יֵדְעוּ֩ כׇל־עַמֵּ֨י הָאָ֜רֶץ אֶת־שְׁמֶ֗ךָ וּלְיִרְאָ֤ה אֹֽתְךָ֙ כְּעַמְּךָ֣ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְלָדַ֕עַת כִּֽי־שִׁמְךָ֣ נִקְרָ֔א עַל־הַבַּ֥יִת הַזֶּ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר בָּנִֽיתִי׃
Translit: vəʾattāh tishmaʿ min-hasshāmayim mimməkhōn shivtekhā vəʿāsîthā kəkhōl ʾasher-yiqrāʾ ʾēlekhā hannokhrî ləmaʿan yēdhəʿū khol-ʿammē hāʾāretṣ ʾeth-shəmekhā ūləyirʾāh ʾōthəkhā kəʿamməkhā yisrāʾēl vəlādhaʿath kî-shimkhā niqrāʾ ʿal-habbayith hazzeh ʾasher bānîthî
English: Hear thou from heaven thy dwelling place, and do according to all for which the foreigner calls to thee; in order that all the peoples of the earth may know thy name and fear thee, as do thy people Israel, and that they may know that this house which I have built is called by thy name.

Hebrew: לָכֵ֛ן יֵדַ֥ע עַמִּ֖י שְׁמִ֑י לָכֵן֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֔וּא כִּֽי־אֲנִי־ה֥וּא הַֽמְדַבֵּ֖ר הִנֵּֽנִי׃
Translit: lākhēn yēdhaʿ ʿammî shəmî lākhēn bayyōm hahūʾ kî-ʾanî-hūʾ hamdhabbēr hinnēnî
English: Therefore my people shall know my name; therefore in that day they shall know that it is I who speak; here am I.

Hebrew: לָכֵן֙ הִנְנִ֣י מֽוֹדִיעָ֔ם בַּפַּ֣עַם הַזֹּ֔את אוֹדִיעֵ֥ם אֶת־יָדִ֖י וְאֶת־גְּבֽוּרָתִ֑י וְיָדְע֖וּ כִּֽי־שְׁמִ֥י יְהוָֽה׃
Translit: lākhēn hinnî mōdhîʿām bappaʿam hazzōʾth ʾōdhîʿēm ʾeth-yādhî vəʾeth-gəvūrāthî vəyādhəʿū kî-shəmî ʾadhōnāi
English: Therefore, behold, I will make them know, this once I will make them know my power and my might, and they shall know that my name is YHVH.

Hebrew: וְאֶת־שֵׁ֨ם קׇדְשִׁ֜י אוֹדִ֗יעַ בְּתוֹךְ֙ עַמִּ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְלֹֽא־אַחֵ֥ל אֶת־שֵׁם־קׇדְשִׁ֖י ע֑וֹד וְיָדְע֤וּ הַגּוֹיִם֙ כִּי־אֲנִ֣י יְהוָ֔ה קָד֖וֹשׁ בְּיִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
Translit: vəʾeth-shēm qodhshî ʾōdhîaʿ bəthōkh ʿammî yisrāʾēl vəlōʾ-ʾaḥēl ʾeth-shēm-qodhshî ʿōdh vəyādhəʿū haggōyim kî-ʾanî ʾadhōnāi qādhōsh bəyisrāʾēl
English: And my holy name I will make known in the midst of my people Israel; and I will not let my holy name be profaned any more; and the nations shall know that I am YHVH, the Holy One in Israel.

Hebrew: וְֽיֵדְע֗וּ כִּֽי־אַתָּ֬ה שִׁמְךָ֣ יְהוָ֣ה לְבַדֶּ֑ךָ עֶ֝לְי֗וֹן עַל־כׇּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
Translit: vəyēdhəʿū kî-ʾattāh shimkhā ʾadhōnāi ləvaddekhā ʿelyōn ʿal-kol-hāʾāretṣ
English: Let them know that thou alone, whose name is YHVH, art the Most High over all the earth.

Hebrew: כִּקְדֹ֧חַ אֵ֣שׁ הֲמָסִ֗ים מַ֚יִם תִּבְעֶה־אֵ֔שׁ לְהוֹדִ֥יעַ שִׁמְךָ֖ לְצָרֶ֑יךָ מִפָּנֶ֖יךָ גּוֹיִ֥ם יִרְגָּֽזוּ׃
Translit: kiqdhōaḥ ʾēsh hamāsîm mayim tivʿeh-ʾēsh ləhōdhîaʿ shimkhā lətṣārekhā mippānekhā gōyim yirgāzū
English: As when fire kindles brushwood and the fire causes water to boil-- to make thy name known to thy adversaries, and that the nations might tremble at thy presence!

Hebrew: שְׁפֹ֣ךְ חֲמָתְךָ֗ עַל־הַגּוֹיִם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹֽא־יְדָע֔וּךָ וְעַל֙ מִשְׁפָּח֔וֹת אֲשֶׁ֥ר בְּשִׁמְךָ֖ לֹ֣א קָרָ֑אוּ כִּֽי־אָכְל֣וּ אֶֽת־יַעֲקֹ֗ב וַאֲכָלֻ֨הוּ֙ וַיְכַלֻּ֔הוּ וְאֶת־נָוֵ֖הוּ הֵשַֽׁמּוּ׃
Translit: shəfōkh ḥamāthəkhā ʿal-haggōyim ʾasher lōʾ-yədhāʿūkhā vəʿal mishpāḥōth ʾasher bəshimkhā lōʾ qārāʾū kî-ʾākhəlū ʾeth-yaʿaqōv vaʾakhāluhū vaykhalluhū vəʾeth-nāvēhū hēshammū
English: Pour out thy wrath upon the nations that know thee not, and upon the peoples that call not on thy name; for they have devoured Jacob; they have devoured him and consumed him, and have laid waste his habitation.

Hebrew: שְׁפֹ֤ךְ חֲמָתְךָ֨ אֶֽל־הַגּוֹיִם֮ אֲשֶׁ֪ר לֹא־יְדָ֫ע֥וּךָ וְעַ֥ל מַמְלָכ֑וֹת אֲשֶׁ֥ר בְּ֝שִׁמְךָ֗ לֹ֣א קָרָֽאוּ׃
Translit: shəfōkh ḥamāthəkhā ʾel-haggōyim ʾasher lōʾ-yədhāʿūkhā vəʿal mamlākhōth ʾasher bəshimkhā lōʾ qārāʾū
English: Pour out thy anger on the nations that do not know thee, and on the kingdoms that do not call on thy name!

Hebrew: נֻ֤דוּ לוֹ֙ כׇּל־סְבִיבָ֔יו וְכֹ֖ל יֹדְעֵ֣י שְׁמ֑וֹ אִמְר֗וּ אֵיכָ֤ה נִשְׁבַּר֙ מַטֵּה־עֹ֔ז מַקֵּ֖ל תִּפְאָרָֽה׃
Translit: nudhū lō kol-səvîvāv vəkhōl yōdhəʿē shəmō ʾimrū ʾēkhāh nishbar maṭṭēh-ʿōz maqqēl tifʾārāh
English: Bemoan him, all you who are round about him, and all who know his name; say, 'How the mighty scepter is broken, the glorious staff.'

Hebrew: וְיִבְטְח֣וּ בְ֭ךָ יוֹדְעֵ֣י שְׁמֶ֑ךָ כִּ֤י לֹֽא־עָזַ֖בְתָּ דֹרְשֶׁ֣יךָ יְהוָֽה׃
Translit: vəyivṭəḥū vəkhā yōdhəʿē shəmekhā kî lōʾ-ʿāzavtā dhōrəshekhā ʾadhōnāi
English: And those who know thy name put their trust in thee, for thou, O YHVH, hast not forsaken those who seek thee.

Hebrew: כִּ֤י בִ֣י חָ֭שַׁק וַאֲפַלְּטֵ֑הוּ אֲ֝שַׂגְּבֵ֗הוּ כִּֽי־יָדַ֥ע שְׁמִֽי׃
Translit: kî vî ḥāshaq vaʾafalləṭēhū ʾasaggəvēhū kî-yādhaʿ shəmî
English: Because he cleaves to me in love, I will deliver him; I will protect him, because he knows my name.

Hebrew: וָאַ֨עַשׂ֙ לְמַ֣עַן שְׁמִ֔י לְבִלְתִּ֥י הֵחֵ֛ל לְעֵינֵ֥י הַגּוֹיִ֖ם אֲשֶׁר־הֵ֣מָּה בְתוֹכָ֑ם אֲשֶׁ֨ר נוֹדַ֤עְתִּי אֲלֵיהֶם֙ לְעֵ֣ינֵיהֶ֔ם לְהוֹצִיאָ֖ם מֵאֶ֥רֶץ מִצְרָֽיִם׃
Translit: vāʾaʿas ləmaʿan shəmî ləviltî hēḥēl ləʿēnē haggōyim ʾasher-hēmmāh vəthōkhām ʾasher nōdhaʿtî ʾalēhem ləʿēnēhem ləhōtṣîʾām mēʾeretṣ mitṣrāyim
English: But I acted for the sake of my name, that it should not be profaned in the sight of the nations among whom they dwelt, in whose sight I made myself known to them in bringing them out of the land of Egypt.

Hebrew: וִֽידַעְתֶּם֙ כִּֽי־אֲנִ֣י יְהוָ֔ה בַּעֲשׂוֹתִ֥י אִתְּכֶ֖ם לְמַ֣עַן שְׁמִ֑י לֹא֩ כְדַרְכֵיכֶ֨ם הָרָעִ֜ים וְכַעֲלִילֽוֹתֵיכֶ֤ם הַנִּשְׁחָתוֹת֙ בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יְהוִֽה׃
Translit: vîdhaʿtem kî-ʾanî ʾadhōnāi baʿasōthî ʾittəkhem ləmaʿan shəmî lōʾ khədharkhēkhem hārāʿîm vəkhaʿalîlōthēkhem hannishḥāthōth bēth yisrāʾēl nəʾum ʾadhōnāi ʾelōhîm
English: And you shall know that I am YHVH, when I deal with you for my name's sake, not according to your evil ways, nor according to your corrupt doings, O house of Israel, says the Lord YHVH.
Yet he saved them for his name's sake, that he might make known his mighty power.
